title: Assistant message with thinking block followed by text block

messages.content: If a train travels 120 km in 1.5 hours, what is its average speed?

content.text: Speed = distance / time. Distance = 120 km, time = 1.5 hours. So speed = 120 / 1.5 = 80 km/h.
The average speed of the train is 80 km/h. (Speed = 120 km ÷ 1.5 h = 80 km/h)
